sqlMap.select:
SELECT *, NULL AS customInfo FROM V_DP_TEMP_AUTH_INFO t
processOrderNum = #processOrderNum# lendInfoId = #lendInfoId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO pm_presales_lend_info_from_oa (projectCode, processStartTime, lendInfoId, processOrderNum , applyUserCode, applyUserName , marketName, systemName, expendName, industryName , applyDeptCode, applyDeptName, applyDate, projectName, applyType , applyTypeName, salesUserCode, salesUserName, salesUserMobile, productLine, productLineName , applyCause, followUpPlan, testStartTime, testEndTime, authPlanDate , authDate, resellSuccessfully, useDays, resaleCertificateFile, provideAuthFile , infoFile, customInfo) values
(#list[].projectCode#, #list[].processStartTime#, #list[].lendInfoId#, #list[].processOrderNum#, #list[].applyUserCode#, #list[].applyUserName# , #list[].marketName#, #list[].systemName#, #list[].expendName#, #list[].industryName# , #list[].applyDeptCode#, #list[].applyDeptName#, #list[].applyDate#, #list[].projectName#, #list[].applyType# , #list[].applyTypeName#, #list[].salesUserCode#, #list[].salesUserName#, #list[].salesUserMobile#, #list[].productLine#, #list[].productLineName# , #list[].applyCause#, #list[].followUpPlan#, #list[].testStartTime#, #list[].testEndTime#, #list[].authPlanDate# , #list[].authDate#, #list[].resellSuccessfully#, #list[].useDays#, #list[].resaleCertificateFile#, #list[].provideAuthFile# , #list[].infoFile#, #list[].customInfo# )
sqlMap.select:
SELECT *, NULL AS customInfo FROM V_DP_TEMP_AUTH_DETAIL t
infoId = #lendInfoId# contractNum = #contractNo#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO pm_presales_lend_detail_from_oa (id,infoId,contractNum,deviceSerialnum,modelNum, applyCount, isSoftware, customInfo) values
(#list[].id#, #list[].infoId#, #list[].contractNum#, #list[].deviceSerialnum#, #list[].modelNum#, #list[].applyCount#, #list[].isSoftware# , #list[].customInfo# )
sqlMap.sql: IFNULL(plio.customInfo, '{}'), JSON_OBJECT('processStartTime', DATE_FORMAT(plio.processStartTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') , 'projectCode', plio.projectCode , 'projectName', plio.projectName , 'processOrderNum', plio.processOrderNum , 'applyUserCode', plio.applyUserCode , 'applyUserName', plio.applyUserName , 'applyDate', DATE_FORMAT(plio.applyDate, '%Y-%m-%d') , 'applyDeptCode', plio.applyDeptCode , 'applyDeptName', plio.applyDeptName , 'applyType', plio.applyType , 'applyTypeName', plio.applyTypeName , 'salesUserCode', plio.salesUserCode , 'salesUserName', plio.salesUserName , 'productLineName', plio.productLineName , 'marketName', plio.marketName , 'systemName', plio.systemName , 'expendName', plio.expendName , 'industryName', plio.industryName , 'applyCause', plio.applyCause , 'followUpPlan', plio.followUpPlan , 'testStartTime', DATE_FORMAT(plio.testStartTime, '%Y-%m-%d') , 'testEndTime', DATE_FORMAT(plio.testEndTime, '%Y-%m-%d') , 'authPlanDate', DATE_FORMAT(plio.authPlanDate, '%Y-%m-%d') , 'authDate', DATE_FORMAT(plio.authDate, '%Y-%m-%d') , 'resellSuccessfully', plio.resellSuccessfully , 'useDays', plio.useDays , 'resaleCertificateFile', plio.resaleCertificateFile , 'provideAuthFile', plio.provideAuthFile , 'source', 'OA' )

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pps.projectCode, pps.projectName, pps.dutyName AS salesManName , IFNULL(p.salesmanTel, pps.dutyContactWay) AS salesManLink, pps.officeCode , pps.marketName, pps.systemName, pps.expendName, pps.industryName, pps.pspm AS productManager FROM pm_presales_lend_info_from_sms pps INNER JOIN ( SELECT projectCode, max(lendInfoId) AS lendInfoId FROM pm_presales_lend_info_from_sms GROUP BY projectCode ) mps ON pps.projectCode = mps.projectCode AND pps.lendInfoId = mps.lendInfoId LEFT JOIN pm_person_from_oa p ON p.salesmanCode = RIGHT(LEFT(pps.dutyName, 6), 5) GROUP BY projectCode ORDER BY NULL ) pls ON pls.projectCode = plio.projectCode LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pps.projectCode, pps.projectName , CONCAT_WS('-', pps.salesManCode, pps.salesManName) AS salesManName , p.salesmanTel AS salesManLink, pps.officeCode, pps.marketName, pps.systemName, pps.expendName , pps.industryName FROM pm_project_property_from_sms pps INNER JOIN ( SELECT projectCode, max(orderExecNumber) AS orderExecNumber FROM pm_project_property_from_sms GROUP BY projectCode ) mps ON pps.projectCode = mps.projectCode AND pps.orderExecNumber = mps.orderExecNumber LEFT JOIN pm_person_from_oa p ON p.salesmanCode = RIGHT(pps.salesManCode, 5) GROUP BY projectCode ORDER BY NULL ) pps ON pps.projectCode = plio.projectCode
